name: Medford

population.sourceName: US Decennial Census 2020, via Wikipedia list of MA municipalities

majorFacilities.name: Lawrence Memorial Hospital of Medford
majorFacilities.type: outpatient and urgent care campus (no emergency department)

healthcareLandscape.dominantFacilityType: hospital-affiliated outpatient campus, urgent care and ambulatory surgery
healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: CREDIBILITY RISK: still branded 'Hospital' but it cut all med/surg and ICU beds in 2017 and permanently closed its emergency department in 2018. Never describe it as a full-service hospital or imply an ER.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
